sentences.arabic: تَشْتَهِرُ المُدُنُ العَرَبِيَّةُ القَدِيمَةُ بِجَمَالِ عِمَارَتِهَا الإِسْلَامِيَّةِ الفَرِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stari arapski gradovi poznati su po ljepoti svoje jedinstvene islamske arhitekture.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient Arab cities are famous for the beauty of their unique Islamic architecture.

sentences.arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ المَسَاجِدُ وَالقُصُورُ بِالزَّخَارِفِ الهَنْدَسِيَّةِ الدَّقِيقَةِ وَالأَقْوَاسِ.
sentences.translation: Džamije i palate odlikuju se preciznim geometrijskim ukrasima i lukovima.
sentences.translationEn: Mosques and palaces are characterized by precise geometric decorations and arches.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ المِعْمَارِيُّونَ يَسْتَخْدِمُونَ الأَلْوَانَ الزَّاهِيَةَ لِتَزْيِينِ الجُدْرَانِ وَالسُّقُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Arhitekte su koristile jarke boje za ukrašavanje zidova i plafona.
sentences.translationEn: Architects used bright colors to decorate walls and ceilings.

sentences.arabic: يَمْكِنُ لِلزَّائِرِ أَنْ يَرَى هَذَا الفَنَّ فِي مَدِينَةِ غَرْنَاطَةَ أَوْ القَاهِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetitelj može vidjeti ovu umjetnost u Granadi ili Kairu.
sentences.translationEn: A visitor can see this art in Granada or Cairo.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبِرُ هَذِهِ المَبَانِي شَاهِدًا عَلَى التَّارِيخِ العَرِيقِ لِلْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove građevine se smatraju svjedokom bogate historije regije.
sentences.translationEn: These buildings are considered a witness to the ancient history of the region.
